description: A refined, scan-optimized layout for dense data pages (Lead and Account details). Introduces a sticky table-of-contents navigation, highly distinct collapsible section headers, and generous optical spacing to prevent visual fatigue.

hierarchy.h1_page_title: text-3xl sm:text-4xl font-extrabold tracking-tight text-slate-900 font-manrope

spacing_and_layout.page_container: max-w-[1600px] mx-auto p-4 md:p-8 flex flex-col xl:flex-row gap-8 items-start relative
spacing_and_layout.main_content_column: flex-1 flex flex-col gap-8 w-full min-w-0
spacing_and_layout.sidebar_navigation: hidden xl:block w-72 shrink-0 sticky top-8 max-h-[calc(100vh-4rem)] overflow-y-auto no-scrollbar pb-8

StickySectionNav.container: flex flex-col gap-1 border-l border-slate-200 pl-4
StickySectionNav.nav_item: group flex items-center gap-3 px-3 py-2 text-sm font-medium rounded-lg transition-all duration-200 text-slate-600 hover:bg-slate-100 hover:text-slate-900 data-[active=true]:bg-emerald-50 data-[active=true]:text-emerald-700 data-[active=true]:font-bold relative
StickySectionNav.nav_item_indicator: absolute -left-[17px] w-[2px] h-6 rounded-r bg-emerald-500 transition-transform origin-left scale-y-0 group-data-[active=true]:scale-y-100
StickySectionNav.usage: Use IntersectionObserver to track which section is currently in view and update the `data-active` state of the nav items.

SectionContainer.wrapper: scroll-mt-24 group flex flex-col rounded-2xl border border-slate-200 bg-white shadow-sm transition-shadow hover:shadow-md overflow-hidden
SectionContainer.usage: Each section must have a unique `id` matching the href of the Sticky Nav. Use `scroll-mt-24` (or similar) to ensure the header doesn't get hidden behind a sticky top-nav when scrolling to anchor.

SectionHeader.wrapper: flex items-center justify-between px-6 py-5 border-b border-slate-100 bg-slate-50/50 cursor-pointer select-none transition-colors hover:bg-slate-50
SectionHeader.icon_wrapper: flex items-center justify-center w-10 h-10 rounded-xl bg-white border border-slate-200 shadow-sm text-slate-500 group-hover:text-emerald-600 group-hover:border-emerald-200 group-hover:bg-emerald-50/50 transition-colors
SectionHeader.indicator_pill: w-1.5 h-6 bg-emerald-500 rounded-full hidden sm:block
SectionHeader.usage: Implement as a button/trigger for collapsibility. Add a visual indicator (like a left emerald pill or distinct icon container) to anchor the eye. Provide right-aligned utility actions if needed (e.g. 'Add', 'Edit') before the collapse chevron.

SectionContent.wrapper: p-6 sm:p-8 animate-in fade-in duration-300 data-[state=closed]:hidden data-[state=closed]:animate-out data-[state=closed]:fade-out
SectionContent.empty_state: flex flex-col items-center justify-center py-12 text-center bg-slate-50/50 rounded-xl border border-dashed border-slate-200 m-6

accessibility.headings: Ensure sequential heading order (H1 for page, H2 for sections, H3 for sub-cards).
accessibility.interactive: Include aria-expanded for collapsibles, aria-controls pointing to the content region ID.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Do not convert the app to TypeScript. Use React JS and standard Tailwind classes.
2. Add `scroll-smooth` to the html/body if not present.

3. Restructure both 'Lead Detail' and 'Account Detail' pages to use a two-column layout on large screens: the left column (main content, `flex-1`) and right/left sidebar (Sticky Navigation, `w-72 sticky top-8`).

4. Create a reusable `Section` component that encapsulates the `SectionContainer`, `SectionHeader`, and `SectionContent`. Use Shadcn's `Collapsible` primitive or local state to handle the open/close behavior.
5. Every section must have an `id` attribute. Pass this ID to the Sticky Nav component to render anchor links (`<a href="#section-id">`).
6. In the `SectionHeader`, implement the dual-title system: An `eyebrow` text (e.g., 'FINANCIALS') and the main `h2` title (e.g., 'Invoice Summary').
7. Include a distinct icon inside `icon_wrapper` for every single section (e.g., FileText for Deck, MapPin for Location, DollarSign for Projections).
8. Implement an IntersectionObserver hook in the Sticky Nav to automatically highlight the current section as the user scrolls down.
9. Add `data-testid` to all navigational elements, section headers, and collapse triggers (e.g., `data-testid="nav-link-location"`, `data-testid="section-header-location"`).
10. Replace existing basic white Cards with this new Section structure. Do NOT alter the inner data logic/tables of the sections, just the wrapper and header presentation.
